title: Mrtvý mezi zivými
writer: Sigurd Christiansen, Elmar Klos, Borivoj Zeman
actors: Karel Höger, Eduard Dubský, Vjaceslav Irmanov
plot: The post office in Liderice is attacked by robbers who kill the clerk Klecka, wound Munk and force Jirí Valta to hand over the cash. Munk, with his light injuries, is hailed as a hero whereas Valta is generally considered a coward...
